source_inspiration: Academic cofounder L1 — picnic blanket counting
stem_template: Look at the {scene}. How many {adjective} {object} do you see?

visual_manifest.art_brief: A {scene} with {N} bright {adjective} {object} scattered across it. Each {object} should be distinct and easy to tap.

misconceptions.feedback_child: Almost! One got counted twice. Try pointing to each one just once.
So close! Check if you missed one hiding in the corner.
Let's slow down and count together, one by one.

socratic_feedback.on_correct: Great job! You counted {N} {object}. Now they're ready for the picnic!
socratic_feedback.on_under_count: You're almost there! Keep counting — what number comes after that?
socratic_feedback.on_over_count: Oops! Looks like you counted one twice. Point at each one just once.
socratic_feedback.on_timeout: Take your time! Start from the left and tap each {object} one at a time.
socratic_feedback.encouragement_after_retry: You've got this! Touch each one only once.

author: AP
